query:
SELECT id, userId, 
  CASE WHEN tastytradeClientSecret IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_client_secret,
  CASE WHEN tastytradeRefreshToken IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_refresh_token,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  defaultTastytradeAccountId
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
command:

  CASE WHEN tastytradeClientSecret IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_client_secret,
  CASE WHEN tastytradeRefreshToken IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_refresh_token,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  defaultTastytradeAccountId
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
